goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'architecture'.
Make sure you get 'phone number' and 'postcode'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'sunday' and should go to 'norwich'.
The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should 'arrive by 12:30'.
Make sure you get 'travel time' and 'train ID'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of architecture
Make sure you get phone number and postcode
You are also looking for a train. The train should leave on sunday and should go to norwich
The train should depart from cambridge and should arrive by 12:30
Make sure you get travel time and train ID
